subcodes.first_line: O kind friends of mine, the letter which [arrived] following the advent of those two luminous souls, Mírzá Ṭiráz and Mírzá [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران مهربان من نامه ای که پس از ورود دو شمع منور میرزا طراز و میرزا
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @pride; vanity; laying claim to inner knowledge, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
